lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

TuningNumberSelected.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: TUNING NUMBER SELECTED

DeratingAssistanceLevel.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Derating assistance level (0 to 100%)

AssistanceLevel.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ASSISTANCE_LEVEL/Percentage of assistance avaliable

SystemMode.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: system mode (renault stateflow)

SupplyVoltage.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: VOLTAGE_ST/Computer supply voltage

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

VehicleSpeed.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: VEHICULE_SPEED/Vehicle speed (in km/h) from CAN signal

SupplierInternalFaultCode_A.Hex.comment: Supplier fault code for this DTC (A-fault)

SupplierInternalFaultCode_Event.Hex.comment: Supplier fault code for this DTC (Event)

SupplierInternalFaultCode_B.Hex.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: INTERNAL_FAULT_CODE/Supplier fault code for this DTC

lists.0: Activated (default value) => if TJP on, EPS shall switch to dedicated TJP mode
lists.1: Deactivated => if TJP on, EPS follows current selected driving mode

MotorTemperature.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Motor_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

ElectricalMotorSpeed.comment: cf spec DiagONCAN Electrical Moto rSpeed

ECUTemperature.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ECU_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

FilteredVehicleSpeed.comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: FILTERED VEHICLE SPEED/HEPS calculation ; information in use

lists.0: 4 wheel steering not present (no emission of the frame EPS_R5)

DecoBatt_Activation.comment: configuration of presence of Deco Batt function

lists.0: Cut off assistance permanently during stop auto (default value)
lists.1: Cut off assistance with possibility to restart engine by EPS during stop auto
lists.2: No cut off assistance during stop auto

lists.0: Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
lists.1: All  faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
lists.2: All  faults reports and alerts are enabled

MeasuredMotorCurrent.comment: non implémentée donc à $00 dans la snapshot

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.
